DI_tm_select_building_level_1_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        set_variable = { name = DI_title_manager_building_level value = 1 }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_level_1_selected_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }

        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_capital_bureau_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = capital_bureau_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = capital_bureau_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = capital_bureau_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = capital_bureau_04
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = capital_bureau_05
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6 }
                    }
                    add_building = capital_bureau_06
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7 }
                    }
                    add_building = capital_bureau_07
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8 }
                    }
                    add_building = capital_bureau_08
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_capital_bureau_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                DI_remove_building_type_effect = { BUILDING = capital_bureau }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_castle_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        NOT = { has_building_or_higher = castle_01 }
                    }
                    set_holding_type = castle_holding
                }
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = castle_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = castle_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = castle_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = castle_04
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_castle_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = castle_04 } remove_building = castle_04 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = castle_03 } remove_building = castle_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = castle_02 } remove_building = castle_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = castle_01 } remove_building = castle_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = royal_garden_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = royal_garden_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = royal_garden_03
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_royal_garden_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = royal_garden_03 } remove_building = royal_garden_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = royal_garden_02 } remove_building = royal_garden_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = royal_garden_01 } remove_building = royal_garden_01 }
            }
        }
    }

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = legendary_hunting_lodge
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_legendary_hunting_lodge_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = legendary_hunting_lodge } remove_building = legendary_hunting_lodge }
            }
        }
    }

DI_tm_building_generic_copper_mines_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = generic_copper_mines_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = generic_copper_mines_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = generic_copper_mines_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = generic_copper_mines_04
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_generic_copper_mines_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = generic_copper_mines_04 } remove_building = generic_copper_mines_04 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = generic_copper_mines_03 } remove_building = generic_copper_mines_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = generic_copper_mines_02 } remove_building = generic_copper_mines_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = generic_copper_mines_01 } remove_building = generic_copper_mines_01 }
            }
        }

                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = zijinshan_mines_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = zijinshan_mines_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = zijinshan_mines_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = zijinshan_mines_04
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

                    add_building = phnom_dek_mines_04
                }
            }
        }
    }

    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = trepca_mines_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = trepca_mines_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = trepca_mines_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = trepca_mines_04
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_trepca_mines_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = trepca_mines_04 } remove_building = trepca_mines_04 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = trepca_mines_03 } remove_building = trepca_mines_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = trepca_mines_02 } remove_building = trepca_mines_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = trepca_mines_01 } remove_building = trepca_mines_01 }
            }
        }
    }

                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = hpakant_mines_04
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

                else_if = { limit = { has_building = sado_mines_02 } remove_building = sado_mines_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = sado_mines_01 } remove_building = sado_mines_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

                    add_building = common_tradeport_02
                }
                else_if = {

                }
                else_if = {

                    }
                    add_building = common_tradeport_04
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = common_tradeport_05
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6 }
                    }
                    add_building = common_tradeport_06
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {

                    add_building = common_tradeport_07

                else_if = {

            }

                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8 }
                    }
                    add_building = elephant_pens_08
                }
            }
        }
    }

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = horse_pastures_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = horse_pastures_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = horse_pastures_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = horse_pastures_04
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = horse_pastures_05
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6 }
                    }
                    add_building = horse_pastures_06
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7 }
                    }
                    add_building = horse_pastures_07
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8 }
                    }
                    add_building = horse_pastures_08
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6 }
                    }
                    add_building = smiths_06
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7 }
                    }
                    add_building = smiths_07
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8 }
                    }
                    add_building = smiths_08
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_smiths_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                DI_remove_building_type_effect = { BUILDING = smiths }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_temple_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        NOT = { has_building_or_higher = temple_01 }
                    }
                    set_holding_type = church_holding
                }
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = temple_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = temple_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = temple_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = temple_04
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_temple_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = temple_04 } remove_building = temple_04 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = temple_03 } remove_building = temple_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = temple_02 } remove_building = temple_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = temple_01 } remove_building = temple_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

                else_if = { limit = { has_building = wantilan_01 } remove_building = wantilan_01 }
            }
        }
    }

DI_tm_building_kora_kora_yards_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = kora_kora_yards_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = kora_kora_yards_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = kora_kora_yards_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = kora_kora_yards_04
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_walls_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = walls_00
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = walls_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = walls_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = walls_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = walls_04
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_walls_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = walls_04 } remove_building = walls_04 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = walls_03 } remove_building = walls_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = walls_02 } remove_building = walls_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = walls_01 } remove_building = walls_01 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = walls_00 } remove_building = walls_00 }
            }
        }
    }
}

            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8
        }

        save_scope_as = player

            variable = DI_action_provinces

                else_if = {

                    }
                    add_building = dragon_hoard_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = dragon_hoard_04
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = dragon_hoard_05
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6 }

                }
                else_if = {

                }
                else_if = {

                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8 }
                    }
                    add_building = dragon_hoard_08
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_dragon_hoard_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                DI_remove_building_type_effect = { BUILDING = dragon_hoard }
            }
        }
    }
}

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = garrison_tower_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = garrison_tower_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = garrison_tower_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = garrison_tower_04
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_citadel_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = citadel_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = citadel_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = citadel_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = citadel_04
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = citadel_05
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6 }
                    }
                    add_building = citadel_06
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7 }
                    }
                    add_building = citadel_07
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8 }
                    }
                    add_building = citadel_08
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_citadel_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                DI_remove_building_type_effect = { BUILDING = citadel }
            }
        }
    }
}

                else_if = { limit = { has_building = dwarven_skirmisher_barracks_05 } remove_building = dwarven_skirmisher_barracks_05 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = dwarven_skirmisher_barracks_04 } remove_building = dwarven_skirmisher_barracks_04 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = dwarven_skirmisher_barracks_03 } remove_building = dwarven_skirmisher_barracks_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = dwarven_skirmisher_barracks_02 } remove_building = dwarven_skirmisher_barracks_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = dwarven_skirmisher_barracks_01 } remove_building = dwarven_skirmisher_barracks_01 }
            }

DI_tm_building_dwarven_siege_workshop_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = dwarven_siege_workshop_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = dwarven_siege_workshop_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = dwarven_siege_workshop_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = dwarven_siege_workshop_04
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = dwarven_siege_workshop_05
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

                    add_building = dwarven_surface_forge_06
                }
            }
        }
    }

            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = elven_port_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = elven_port_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = elven_port_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = elven_port_04
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = elven_port_05
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6 }
                    }
                    add_building = elven_port_06
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7 }
                    }
                    add_building = elven_port_07
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = elven_embassy_05
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

                        }
                    }
                    add_building = hall_of_music_and_tales_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = hall_of_music_and_tales_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = hall_of_music_and_tales_03
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_lotr_great_citadel_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = lotr_great_citadel_03 } remove_building = lotr_great_citadel_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = lotr_great_citadel_02 } remove_building = lotr_great_citadel_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = lotr_great_citadel_01 } remove_building = lotr_great_citadel_01 }
            }
        }
    }

    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {

                    limit = {
                        OR = {

                    }
                    add_building = wonder_osgiliath_02

                else_if = {

                    }
                    add_building = wonder_osgiliath_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = wonder_osgiliath_04
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = wonder_osgiliath_05
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = wonder_gaven_04
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = wonder_gaven_05
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_gaven_05 } remove_building = wonder_gaven_05 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_gaven_04 } remove_building = wonder_gaven_04 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_gaven_03 } remove_building = wonder_gaven_03 }

                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }

                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = diamond_mines_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = diamond_mines_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = diamond_mines_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = diamond_mines_04
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = diamond_mines_05
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6 }
                    }
                    add_building = diamond_mines_06
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7 }
                    }
                    add_building = diamond_mines_07
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8 }
                    }
                    add_building = diamond_mines_08
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 9 }
                    }
                    add_building = diamond_mines_09
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 10 }
                    }
                    add_building = diamond_mines_10
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_diamond_mines_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = diamond_mines_10 } remove_building = diamond_mines_10 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = diamond_mines_09 } remove_building = diamond_mines_09 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = diamond_mines_08 } remove_building = diamond_mines_08 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = diamond_mines_07 } remove_building = diamond_mines_07 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = diamond_mines_06 } remove_building = diamond_mines_06 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = diamond_mines_05 } remove_building = diamond_mines_05 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = diamond_mines_04 } remove_building = diamond_mines_04 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = diamond_mines_03 } remove_building = diamond_mines_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = diamond_mines_02 } remove_building = diamond_mines_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = diamond_mines_01 } remove_building = diamond_mines_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = scouting_posts_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = scouting_posts_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = scouting_posts_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = scouting_posts_04
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = scouting_posts_05
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6 }
                    }
                    add_building = scouting_posts_06
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7 }
                    }
                    add_building = scouting_posts_07
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8 }
                    }
                    add_building = scouting_posts_08
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_scouting_posts_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                DI_remove_building_type_effect = { BUILDING = scouting_posts }
            }
        }
    }
}

            scope:province = {

            }
        }
    }

DI_tm_building_mountain_pass_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = mountain_pass_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = mountain_pass_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = mountain_pass_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = mountain_pass_04
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_mountain_pass_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = mountain_pass_04 } remove_building = mountain_pass_04 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = mountain_pass_03 } remove_building = mountain_pass_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = mountain_pass_02 } remove_building = mountain_pass_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = mountain_pass_01 } remove_building = mountain_pass_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = wonder_angrenost_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = wonder_angrenost_02
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_wonder_angrenost_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_angrenost_02 } remove_building = wonder_angrenost_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_angrenost_01 } remove_building = wonder_angrenost_01 }
            }

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = wonder_minas_anor_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = wonder_minas_anor_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = wonder_minas_anor_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = wonder_minas_anor_04
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = wonder_minas_anor_05
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6 }
                    }
                    add_building = wonder_minas_anor_06
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7 }
                    }
                    add_building = wonder_minas_anor_07
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_wonder_minas_anor_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_minas_anor_07 } remove_building = wonder_minas_anor_07 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_minas_anor_06 } remove_building = wonder_minas_anor_06 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_minas_anor_05 } remove_building = wonder_minas_anor_05 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_minas_anor_04 } remove_building = wonder_minas_anor_04 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_minas_anor_03 } remove_building = wonder_minas_anor_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_minas_anor_02 } remove_building = wonder_minas_anor_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_minas_anor_01 } remove_building = wonder_minas_anor_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = wonder_edhellond_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = wonder_edhellond_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = wonder_edhellond_03
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_wonder_edhellond_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_edhellond_03 } remove_building = wonder_edhellond_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_edhellond_02 } remove_building = wonder_edhellond_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_edhellond_01 } remove_building = wonder_edhellond_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = wonder_ancalimon
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

    effect = {

            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {

            }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = wonder_zaja_shar_noria_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = wonder_zaja_shar_noria_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = wonder_zaja_shar_noria_03
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_wonder_zaja_shar_noria_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_zaja_shar_noria_03 } remove_building = wonder_zaja_shar_noria_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_zaja_shar_noria_02 } remove_building = wonder_zaja_shar_noria_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_zaja_shar_noria_01 } remove_building = wonder_zaja_shar_noria_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_amarthrynd_03 } remove_building = wonder_amarthrynd_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_amarthrynd_02 } remove_building = wonder_amarthrynd_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_amarthrynd_01 } remove_building = wonder_amarthrynd_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

                if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_temple_sulereb_03 } remove_building = wonder_temple_sulereb_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_temple_sulereb_02 } remove_building = wonder_temple_sulereb_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_temple_sulereb_01 } remove_building = wonder_temple_sulereb_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_wonder_ettenmoors_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = wonder_ettenmoors_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = wonder_ettenmoors_02
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = wonder_himring_01
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_himring_01 } remove_building = wonder_himring_01 }
            }
        }
    }

DI_tm_building_wonder_thakalgund_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = wonder_thakalgund_1
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = wonder_thakalgund_2
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = wonder_thakalgund_3
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = wonder_thakalgund_4
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = wonder_thakalgund_5
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_wonder_thakalgund_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_thakalgund_5 } remove_building = wonder_thakalgund_5 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_thakalgund_4 } remove_building = wonder_thakalgund_4 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_thakalgund_3 } remove_building = wonder_thakalgund_3 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_thakalgund_2 } remove_building = wonder_thakalgund_2 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_thakalgund_1 } remove_building = wonder_thakalgund_1 }
            }
        }
    }
}

                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = wonder_mtgram
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_wonder_mtgram_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_mtgram } remove_building = wonder_mtgram }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_wonder_tradeport_of_kheledul_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = wonder_tradeport_of_kheledul
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = wonder_tradeport_of_kheledul_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = wonder_tradeport_of_kheledul_03
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_wonder_tradeport_of_kheledul_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_tradeport_of_kheledul_03 } remove_building = wonder_tradeport_of_kheledul_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_tradeport_of_kheledul_02 } remove_building = wonder_tradeport_of_kheledul_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_tradeport_of_kheledul } remove_building = wonder_tradeport_of_kheledul }
            }
        }
    }
}

    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = wonder_nar_agathol
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = wonder_nar_agathol_2
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = wonder_nar_agathol_3
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

                else_if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_nar_agathol_2 } remove_building = wonder_nar_agathol_2 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_nar_agathol } remove_building = wonder_nar_agathol }
            }
        }
    }

            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = wonder_mispir
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = wonder_mispir_palace
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_wonder_mispir_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_mispir_palace } remove_building = wonder_mispir_palace }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_mispir } remove_building = wonder_mispir }

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = wonder_tul_harar_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = wonder_tul_harar_02
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_wonder_tul_harar_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_tul_harar_02 } remove_building = wonder_tul_harar_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_tul_harar_01 } remove_building = wonder_tul_harar_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

                }

                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = wonder_pelepelplu_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = wonder_pelepelplu_04
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_wonder_pelepelplu_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_pelepelplu_04 } remove_building = wonder_pelepelplu_04 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_pelepelplu_03 } remove_building = wonder_pelepelplu_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_pelepelplu_02 } remove_building = wonder_pelepelplu_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_pelepelplu_01 } remove_building = wonder_pelepelplu_01 }
            }
        }
    }

                if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_bru_kha_rebuilt_03 } remove_building = wonder_bru_kha_rebuilt_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_bru_kha_rebuilt_02 } remove_building = wonder_bru_kha_rebuilt_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_bru_kha_rebuilt_01 } remove_building = wonder_bru_kha_rebuilt_01 }
            }
        }
    }

            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2

                else_if = {

                else_if = { limit = { has_building = wonder_hall_of_the_king_occupied } remove_building = wonder_hall_of_the_king_occupied }
            }
        }
    }
}

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = flooded_lands_cleared } remove_building = flooded_lands_cleared }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = flooded_lands } remove_building = flooded_lands }
            }
        }
    }
}

        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

                }

            variable = DI_action_provinces

                if = { limit = { has_building = temple_citadel_04 } remove_building = temple_citadel_04 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = temple_citadel_03 } remove_building = temple_citadel_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = temple_citadel_02 } remove_building = temple_citadel_02 }

                }
            }
        }
    }

DI_remove_buildings_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = city_02 } add_building = city_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = city_03 } add_building = city_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = city_04 } add_building = city_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = castle_02 } add_building = castle_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = castle_03 } add_building = castle_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = castle_04 } add_building = castle_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = temple_02 } add_building = temple_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = temple_03 } add_building = temple_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = temple_04 } add_building = temple_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = tribe_02 } add_building = tribe_01 }

                if = { limit = { has_building = allaq_mines_04 } remove_building = allaq_mines_04 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = allaq_mines_03 } remove_building = allaq_mines_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = allaq_mines_02 } remove_building = allaq_mines_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = allaq_mines_01 } remove_building = allaq_mines_01 }

                else_if = { limit = { has_building = amethyst_mines_09 } remove_building = amethyst_mines_09 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = amethyst_mines_08 } remove_building = amethyst_mines_08 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = amethyst_mines_07 } remove_building = amethyst_mines_07 }

                else_if = { limit = { has_building = amethyst_mines_03 } remove_building = amethyst_mines_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = amethyst_mines_02 } remove_building = amethyst_mines_02 }

DI_max_building_upgrades_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = allaq_mines_01 NOT = { has_building = allaq_mines_04 } } add_building = allaq_mines_04 }
